programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cam Newton and the Carolina Panthers hold off Drew Brees and the Saints fourth quarter comeback efforts with 23-20 Thursday night victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Thanks to his pride and joy, the defense, Rex Ryan's return to the Meadowlands was a successful one. That defense shut down Ryan's former team for much of the game, and the Bills scored on offense and special teams in a 22-17 victory over New York.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Los Angeles Rams quarterback Jared Goff threw for 292 yards and three touchdowns and running back Todd Gurley ran for two touchdowns and caught another to help the Rams put up another big offensive performance with a 41-39 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Bobby Wagner's block midway through the fourth quarter was the catalyst in a 21-7 win over the Minnesota Vikings on Monday night that pushed Seattle to the brink of a playoff berth.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cam Newton and the Carolina Panthers hold off Drew Brees and the Saints fourth quarter comeback efforts with 23-20 Thursday night victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Drew Brees throws for 505 yards and seven touchdowns as Kai Forbath kicks a 50-yard field goal to secure a 52-49 Saints victory; the teams set an NFL record with 13 combined touchdown passes.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matt Ryan threw for 291 yards, rookie Julio Jones caught 11 passes for 127 yards, and the Atlanta Falcons held off a second-half rally from Seattle for a 30-28 win over the Seahawks.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matt Ryan threw for 291 yards, rookie Julio Jones caught 11 passes for 127 yards, and the Atlanta Falcons held off a second-half rally from Seattle for a 30-28 win over the Seahawks.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: DeSean Jackson scored on a 65-yard punt return on the final play of the game and the Philadelphia Eagles scored 28 points in the final 7:28 to stun the New York Giants 38-31 Sunday and take over first place in the NFC East.

programme.desc: Watch the matchup between the Buffalo Bills and the Miami Dolphins where Bills quarterback Josh Allen threw for 417 yards and four touchdowns, both career highs, and the Bills beat the Dolphins.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to master different lies on the course, featuring the buried lie, sitting up lie, and flyer lie.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain that the best play isn't always the hero shot. They demonstrate how save strokes by hitting over, under, and around trouble.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: Andrew Rice: Breaking 100
programme.desc: Andrew Rice teaches the setup fundamentals, swing keys and mental tips needed to break 100.

programme.title: Andrew Rice: Breaking 100

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: After finding their car keys hidden within the thick walls of the Castillo de San Marcos in St. Augustine, Florida, the teams scurry to their first golf challenge at the World Golf Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: It's a race against time and each other, as five teams of two find their way out of an alligator infested Florida swamp to the University of Florida football field for an unexpected chipping challenge.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: The teams face an extraordinary "dogleg" tee shot around the first turn of an Ocala, Florida, horse track.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: The players turn the world's most famous beach into the ultimate "bunker challenge" before rushing to the Orlando Magic practice facility for a full court putting contest.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: Starting their day at the Golf Channel studios in Orlando, Florida, each team gets a shot at hosting a highlight package for the PODS Championship at Innisbrook Resort.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: The teams vie for a set of antique clubs and race to Florida's first golf club for an old school short game challenge.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: Long Drive Champion Brian Pavlet helps tee things off at the Bobby Jones Golf Club in Sarasota, Florida.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: Each team must earn an airboat ride to their vehicle before racing to the Mar-a-Lago Club in West Palm.

programme.title: Highway 18

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: From Mallory Square to the renowned Key West party spot, Sloppy Joes, the action culminates on the southernmost golf course in America.

programme.title: School of Golf

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach the key shots in the scoring zone. Martin reveals a tip for mid-wedge shots he learned in-person from 2019 Masters champion Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to putt like the U.S. Open champion. Learn drills to improve your grip, aim, path and keys to sinking more putts. Martin also discusses what you can learn from Ben Hogan's legendary ball striking.
